name: Oviedo Old Town
description: Historic city center with medieval streets, the cathedral, and traditional cider bars.
honesty_note: Busy at weekends; some areas are very tourist-focused.

name: Gijón Beach (San Lorenzo)
description: Long urban beach with a promenade and strong surf conditions.
honesty_note: Can get crowded in summer; water is often cold.

name: Covadonga Lakes
description: Mountain lakes surrounded by dramatic peaks in the Picos de Europa National Park.
honesty_note: Access is restricted in peak season; shuttle buses required.

name: Cudillero
description: Colorful fishing village built into a steep hillside overlooking the sea.
honesty_note: Very small; parking can be difficult.

name: Picos de Europa National Park
description: Large mountain national park with hiking routes, wildlife, and dramatic scenery.
honesty_note: Weather changes quickly; proper gear is essential.

name: Avilés Old Town
description: Well-preserved medieval center with arcaded streets and cultural venues.
honesty_note: Industrial surroundings nearby can surprise visitors.

name: Taramundi
description: Rural village known for traditional knife-making and green landscapes.
